items.title: Is Visa (V) Ken Griffin’s Top Pick?
items.description: While Microsoft Corporation (NASDAQ:MSFT) remains the billionaire’s largest position, Visa Inc. (NYSE:V) ranks 5th on the list of Ken Griffin’s top holdings with a 0.16% portfolio share ($1.04 billion). We recently published a list of youngest hedge fund billionaires and their top stock picks. On February 5, 2026, Visa Inc. (NYSE:V) introduced Visa & Main, a […]

items.title: Is Compass Stock a Buy After Barrier Capital Initiated a Position Worth Over $10 Million?
items.description: Compass delivers cloud-based tools for real estate agents, integrating CRM, marketing, and operations on a unified digital platform.
